_comment: Onboarding v1 — 2026-06-08. One-shot, idempotent workspace setup: installs all Python deps (python3.13) then runs both preflights in report-only mode. It does NOT touch secrets (.env) and does NOT run any paid/scrape step. Brew-level installs (python@3.13, ffmpeg) and the .env secrets file are done by the HUMAN during onboarding — see CLAUDE.md / Supernova-Handoff-Package/START-HERE.md. The agent walks the human through .env in onboarding; the '|| true' on the preflight steps keeps a fresh clone with no .env yet from hard-failing the workspace open. All commands run from the repo root with repo-relative paths and python3.13 (system python3 is 3.9 and lacks packages).

scripts.setup: if [ "$CONDUCTOR_IS_LOCAL" = "1" ]; then python3.13 -m pip install --upgrade --break-system-packages --user requests openpyxl boto3 yt-dlp google-genai python-docx Pillow numpy pyobjc-framework-Vision pyobjc-framework-Quartz pyobjc-framework-Cocoa; python3.13 facebook/scripts/preflight.py --skip-gemini || true; python3.13 analysis/scripts/preflight_enrichment.py || true; fi
